description: Platform Playbooks – maps each deployable AI platform to its constituent SDKs and extensions

platforms.name: AI App Store
platforms.description: All SDKs as installable capabilities; extensions as storefronts
platforms.notes: Every SDK is exposed as an installable capability; every extension acts as a storefront

platforms.name: Enterprise AI Platform
platforms.description: Full enterprise integration with intelligent routing, persistent memory, and sovereign encryption
platforms.notes: Core enterprise bundle: onboarding, connectors, routing, memory persistence, and end-to-end encryption

platforms.name: Agent Builder Studio
platforms.description: Visual and programmatic studio for building autonomous AI agents
platforms.notes: Organism runtime provides living agent substrate; mega-autonomy grants self-direction; orchestration coordinates multi-agent flows; nova-framework supplies modular intelligence scribes

platforms.name: AI Security Platform
platforms.description: Defense-in-depth security stack for AI workloads
platforms.notes: Shield-defense provides threat detection; encryption-token handles token-level security; sovereign-encryption enforces data sovereignty; sentinel-watch monitors in real-time

platforms.name: Developer Toolkit / CLI
platforms.description: Command-line tools and testing frameworks for SDK development and validation
platforms.notes: Languages/ stack provides cognitive DSLs; testing SDKs provide capability validation, stress testing, and autonomous test generation

platforms.name: AI Research Platform
platforms.description: Advanced reasoning, cognition, evolution, and intelligence engine research tools
platforms.notes: Mega-reasoning provides multi-step logical inference; mega-cognition adds metacognitive awareness; mega-evolution enables self-improving architectures; backend-intelligence-engines supply alpha-tier protocols (PROTO-227–233)
